name: OpenClaw Session Bloat Warning
description: OpenClaw plugin for compaction warnings, earlier visible session-heaviness warnings, and timeout/lane-pressure warning heuristics with bundled session-bloat-warning guidance.

stateFilePath.description: Optional path to the plugin-owned warning state JSON file. Defaults to ./.openclaw-session-bloat-warning-state.json in the current working directory.

defaultLanguage.description: Language for user-facing warning copy. Defaults to en.

enablePreCompactionWarning.description: Whether to emit a short warning on before_compaction. Defaults to true.

enablePostCompactionNote.description: Whether to emit a short continuation note on after_compaction when the event carries a writable messages array. Defaults to true.

maxWarningsPerSession.description: Maximum number of early warnings, pre-compaction warnings, and post-compaction notes per session key. Defaults to 2.

enableEarlyWarning.description: Whether to track early session-heaviness, timeout-risk, and lane-pressure signals from llm_input and llm_output and deliver visible warnings on before_agent_reply. Defaults to true.

cooldownTurns.description: Minimum turn gap before another early warning can be counted for the same session. Defaults to 3.

warningCharThreshold.description: Approximate combined prompt-plus-history character threshold for elevated heaviness classification. Defaults to 120000.

warningMessageCountThreshold.description: Approximate history message-count threshold for elevated heaviness classification. Defaults to 80.

earlyWarningCharThreshold.description: Approximate combined prompt-plus-history character threshold for earlier visible warning before near-compaction pressure. Defaults to 90000.

earlyWarningMessageCountThreshold.description: Approximate history message-count threshold for earlier visible warning before near-compaction pressure. Defaults to 60.

warningInputTokensThreshold.description: Observed llm_output usage.input threshold that marks a warning-level heavy turn. Defaults to 120000.

elevatedInputTokensThreshold.description: Observed llm_output usage.input threshold that marks an elevated heavy turn. Defaults to 145000.

criticalInputTokensThreshold.description: Observed llm_output usage.input threshold that marks a critical heavy turn. Defaults to 170000.

timeoutRiskStreakThreshold.description: Number of repeated timeout-like observations required before classifying timeout risk. Defaults to 2.

lanePressureStreakThreshold.description: Number of repeated lane-pressure observations required before classifying queue pressure. Defaults to 1.

noReplyStreakThreshold.description: Number of repeated no-reply observations required before classifying reply failure pressure. Defaults to 2.

timeoutRiskMsThreshold.description: Minimum observed timeout duration used for timeout-risk classification. Defaults to 45000.

lanePressureMsThreshold.description: Minimum observed lane wait duration used for lane-pressure classification. Defaults to 10000.
